text:
Outbound - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016008

PLAY OUTBOUND NOW!

Explore a colorful world and build your own cozy home on wheels. Craft workstations, and source energy from the sun, wind, or water. Upgrade and customize your vehicle, grow crops, and live sustainably off-grid with up to 4 players.

#ps5 #ps5games #outbound

author: PlayStation
text:
Suri: The Seventh Note - Demo Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10010699

Step into the world of SURI: The Seventh Note in this official PS5 Demo Trailer. Explore a world  inspired by Indian folklore, where music holds the key to forgotten memories and unspeakable terror. Supported by the PlayStation India Hero Project.

Play the demo on 21st May and wishlist now on the PlayStation Store

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation
text:
Menace from the Deep: Complete Edition - Launch Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
Menace from the Deep is a roguelike deck builder, set in myth-soaked 1920s USA, where ancient cults and eldritch horrors lurk beneath the surface.

Menace from the Deep: Complete Edition is out now!
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018026

Explore the grim world inspired by Cthulhu Mythos and collect memory fragments to uncover the secret society.
Experience the gritty atmosphere through your multiple runs, upgrade your cards to shape unique strategies and most importantly - try not to lose your sanity.

FEATURES:
- One threat, four answers - four playable heroes (including The Abomination), each with their own unique deck of battle cards and fighting style,
- Shape your destiny - various inventory items, battle allies, powerful relic collections and upgrades to make your run more thrilling,
- Madness repeats itself - enjoy high replayability with different seeds that will let you master the game,
- Truth lies beneath - encounter strange events, uncover dark secrets and recover lost memories,
- Expand the insanity - this edition includes “The Rift of Sanity” DLC, featuring a brand new character, allies, items and an additional game act.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games

author: PlayStation
text:
Blades of Fire - Version 2.0 Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10011854/

Blades of Fire Version 2.0 is available now on Playstation!

Version 2.0 brings brand-new content, improvements, and features to MercurySteam's dark fantasy adventure, including Photo Mode, New Game+, Titanium Difficulty, all-new weapon parts and skins (available in New Game+), Boss Revival Mode, element transmutation, and more!

Oh… and you can now pet the ox!

Are you ready to Forge Your Legend?

#ps5 #ps5games #bladesoffire 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation
text:
Arcade Archives 2 Mr.Do! - ACA 12th Anniversary Release Out Now | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/JP0571-PPSA36122_00-HAMPRDC000000001

Presenting the Arcade Archives 12th anniversary commemorative title!
Eating, throwing or crushing... Mr.Do! is very active! "Arcade Archives Mr.Do!" is now available on PS5 & PS4!

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #arcadearchives

author: PlayStation
text:
Saros - Finding Carcosa: Becoming Arjun | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/saros/

Finding Carcosa: Becoming Arjun is the behind-the-scenes documentary that explores how Arjun came to life by Rahul Kohli in SAROS. Taking you onto the performance capture stage, the film features exclusive footage and new interviews with Kohli and the Housemarque development team, detailing exactly what it took for Rahul to find the character.

SAROS is out now on PS5, enhanced for PS5 Pro.

#ps5 #ps5games #saros
